mapper.sql: SELECT grid_code, longitude, latitude, west_longitude, east_longitude, north_latitude, south_latitude, province, city, district, poi_count, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark FROM jw_grid_meta
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT city FROM jw_grid_meta ORDER BY city
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO jw_grid_meta ( grid_code, longitude, latitude, west_longitude, east_longitude, north_latitude, south_latitude, province, city, district, poi_count, create_by, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{gridCode}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{westLongitude}, #{eastLongitude}, #{northLatitude}, #{southLatitude}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{poiCount}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), sysdate() )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM jw_grid_meta WHERE grid_code IN
#{code}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO jw_grid_meta ( grid_code, longitude, latitude, west_longitude, east_longitude, north_latitude, south_latitude, province, city, district, poi_count, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
(#{item.gridCode}, #{item.longitude}, #{item.latitude}, #{item.westLongitude}, #{item.eastLongitude}, #{item.northLatitude}, #{item.southLatitude}, #{item.province}, #{item.city}, #{item.district}, #{item.poiCount}, sysdate(), sysdate())

INSERT INTO jw_grid_meta ( grid_code, longitude, latitude, west_longitude, east_longitude, north_latitude, south_latitude, province, city, district, poi_count, create_by, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{gridCode}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{westLongitude}, #{eastLongitude}, #{northLatitude}, #{southLatitude}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{poiCount}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), sysdate() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE longitude = VALUES(longitude), latitude = VALUES(latitude), west_longitude = VALUES(west_longitude), east_longitude = VALUES(east_longitude), north_latitude = VALUES(north_latitude), south_latitude = VALUES(south_latitude), province = VALUES(province), city = VALUES(city), district = VALUES(district), poi_count = VALUES(poi_count), update_time = sysdate()

INSERT INTO jw_grid_meta ( grid_code, longitude, latitude, west_longitude, east_longitude, north_latitude, south_latitude, province, city, district, poi_count, create_by, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{gridCode}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{westLongitude}, #{eastLongitude}, #{northLatitude}, #{southLatitude}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{poiCount}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), sysdate() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE longitude = VALUES(longitude), latitude = VALUES(latitude), west_longitude = VALUES(west_longitude), east_longitude = VALUES(east_longitude), north_latitude = VALUES(north_latitude), south_latitude = VALUES(south_latitude), province = VALUES(province), city = VALUES(city), district = VALUES(district), poi_count = VALUES(poi_count), update_time = sysdate()
